items.title: Association of MRI-Visible Perivascular Spaces With Longitudinal Cognitive Decline Over a Decade.
items.abstract: Cerebral small vessel disease (SVD) is the most common vascular contributor to dementia. SVD markers often coexist, contributing to difficulty assessing their independent contributions to cognitive domains. MRI-visible perivascular spaces (PVSs) are an emerging SVD marker visualized by MRI. We previously showed that basal ganglia PVSs cross-sectionally contribute to worse cognition, independent of other SVD markers. To further characterize the clinical relevance of PVS, we studied its role as a unique SVD marker of longitudinal cognitive decline. Participants without stroke or dementia were included in the Vanderbilt Memory and Aging Project, a longitudinal observational cohort study based in Nashville, TN. Participants completed 3T MRI at study entry to measure SVD burden (PVS volume fraction, white matter hyperintensities volume, lacune counts, and cerebral microbleeds counts). PVS volumes were segmented using a deep learning algorithm. Participants underwent comprehensive serial neuropsychological testing over an 11-year follow-up period (mean follow-up = 4.9 ± 3.1 years). Each SVD marker was related to longitudinal neuropsychological performances using a linear mixed-effects model adjusting for age, sex, race/ethnicity, education, baseline cognitive status, apolipoprotein E-ε4 presence, Framingham Stroke Risk Profile, and intracranial volume. Head-to-head comparisons simultaneously tested multiple statistically significant SVD markers. Among participants (n = 750, age 68 ± 9 years, 52% female), higher basal ganglia PVS burden at baseline was associated with worse longitudinal performances in Boston Naming Test (β = -29.63; 95% CI -56.66 to -2.60), Animal Naming (β = -33.09; 95% CI -65.66 to -0.51), Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scale IV Coding (β = -86.36; 95% CI -150.9 to -21.82), executive function composite (β = -9.51; 95% CI -14.33 to -4.68), Hooper Visual Organization Test (β = -26.06; 95% CI -50.53 to -1.59), and episodic memory composite (β = -7.05; 95% CI -11.9 to -2.21). In head-to-head comparisons, basal ganglia PVS remained independent associations with executive function composite (β = -7.47; 95% CI -12.84 to -2.10) and Hooper Visual Organization Test (β = -22.11; 95% CI -42.38 to -1.85). Basal ganglia PVS burden independently contributes to worse longitudinal executive function and visuospatial skills independent of other SVD markers, highlighting PVS as an emerging marker of domain-specific cognitive decline in aging. Although causation cannot be established, findings further support PVS as a vascular contributor to deep brain structure damage underlying cognitive decline over time.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳の小血管病（SVD）は認知症の主要な血管性要因であり、複数のSVDマーカーが共存するため、それぞれの認知機能への独立した影響評価が困難である。MRIで可視化される周血管腔（PVS）は新たなSVDマーカーとして注目されている。  
方法：脳卒中や認知症のない750名（平均年齢68歳）を対象に、3テスラMRIでPVSや他のSVDマーカー（白質高信号、ラクーン、微小出血）を計測し、深層学習でPVS体積を抽出。平均約5年間にわたり詳細な神経心理検査を繰り返し実施し、線形混合効果モデルで認知機能の経時変化とSVDマーカーの関連を解析した。  
結果：基底核のPVS負荷が高いほど、言語、実行機能、視空間認知、エピソード記憶の経時的低下と有意に関連。特に実行機能と視空間認知では他のSVDマーカーの影響を調整しても独立した関連が認められた。  
結論：基底核PVSは他のSVDマーカーとは独立して、加齢に伴う特定認知領域の低下に寄与する新たな血管性認知機能障害の指標であり、深部脳構造の血管障害を反映している可能性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: MRIで可視化される基底核周囲血管周囲腔（PVS）は、脳小血管病（SVD）の新たなマーカーであり、認知機能低下に独立して関連することが示された。750名の高齢者を11年間追跡し、PVS負荷が高いほど実行機能や視空間認知の経時的低下が顕著であった。PVSは他のSVDマーカーと独立して認知機能低下に寄与し、加齢に伴う特定認知領域の障害の重要な指標となる可能性が示唆された。

items.title: The Relationship Between Sleep, Cognition, and Dementia Risk in People With Focal Epilepsy.
items.abstract: Sleep disruption and cognitive impairment are important comorbidities of focal epilepsy. However, the nature to which sleep affects cognition and long-term dementia risk in focal epilepsy, compared with other brain conditions, remains unclear. We examined the relationship between sleep, cognition, and dementia risk in patients with focal epilepsy compared with healthy controls and stroke patients. We conducted an analysis of the prospective UK Biobank cohort study, with baseline assessments performed between 2006 and 2010 and follow-up until 2021. Study groups were mutually exclusive participants with focal epilepsy and stroke at baseline assessment and healthy controls. Sleep characteristics included reports of sleep duration, obstructive sleep apnea, insomnia, napping, and dozing. Main outcomes were risk of incident all-cause dementia and Alzheimer disease from Cox proportional hazard modeling and comparison of executive function measures and brain total hippocampal and gray matter volumes using generalized linear modeling. We examined a sample of 482,207 participants, aged between 38 and 72 years (mean [SD] 57.6 [8.1] years; 53.8% female), without dementia at baseline and a nested imaging subsample of 42,345 participants. Optimal sleep duration (6-8 hours) was associated with better executive function in control, focal epilepsy, and stroke groups. The impact of optimal sleep was significantly higher in individuals with focal epilepsy compared with controls (interaction term,  Optimal sleep modified both cognitive performance and dementia risk in individuals with focal epilepsy compared with stroke patients and healthy controls. Based on self-reported sleep data, these findings suggest that improving sleep may be an impactful intervention to improve cognition and reduce dementia risk particularly in focal epilepsy.
items.summary_ja:
背景：局所てんかん患者では睡眠障害と認知機能障害が重要な併存症であるが、睡眠が認知機能や長期的な認知症リスクに与える影響は他の脳疾患と比較して不明である。  
方法：2006～2010年に英国バイオバンクで実施された前向きコホート研究を用い、局所てんかん患者、脳卒中患者、健常者の睡眠特性（睡眠時間、閉塞性睡眠時無呼吸、不眠、昼寝、居眠り）と認知機能、認知症発症リスクの関連を解析した。対象は38～72歳の482,207名（うち42,345名は脳画像データあり）。  
結果：最適な睡眠時間（6～8時間）は全群で実行機能の向上と関連し、局所てんかん群でその効果が健常者より有意に大きかった。最適睡眠は認知機能だけでなく認知症リスクも修飾し、局所てんかん患者において特に顕著であった。  
結論：自己申告による睡眠改善は、局所てんかん患者の認知機能向上および認知症リスク低減に有効な介入となり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 焦点てんかん患者において、睡眠の質と認知機能、認知症リスクの関係をUKバイオバンクの大規模コホートで検討した。最適な睡眠時間（6～8時間）は認知機能の向上と認知症リスク低減に関連し、特に焦点てんかん患者でその効果が顕著であった。これらの結果は、睡眠改善が焦点てんかん患者の認知機能維持と認知症予防に有効な介入となり得ることを示唆している。

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Thrombectomy With or Without Alteplase in Large Vessel Occlusion Stroke: A Meta-Analysis Considering Time-to-Treatment.
items.abstract: In stroke patients directly admitted to thrombectomy-capable centers, the value of intravenous thrombolysis (IVT) with alteplase before thrombectomy is time dependent. While early IVT may improve outcomes, delayed IVT administration lowers the likelihood of benefit. To date, no previous cost-effectiveness study has considered onset-to-treatment time. This study evaluated the cost-effectiveness of intravenous (IV) alteplase plus thrombectomy vs thrombectomy alone in patients admitted directly to thrombectomy-capable centers across 16 countries, stratified by onset-to-IVT time. A decision tree integrated with a Markov model estimated costs, quality-adjusted life years (QALYs), and incremental net monetary benefit (INMB) over 15 years. A willingness-to-pay threshold of one gross domestic product per capita was applied for each country. Effectiveness data were derived from individual patient data from 6 trials including patients with anterior circulation large-vessel occlusion eligible for both IVT and thrombectomy who presented directly to thrombectomy-capable centers. Costs were obtained from a literature review. Onset-to-IVT time was categorized as <140, 140-169, 170-199, and ≥200 minutes. One-way sensitivity and probabilistic sensitivity analyses were performed to check robustness of results. Ninety-day functional outcome distributions from 2,268 patients (median age 71 years; 44% female) were used to model cost-effectiveness in a hypothetical cohort of 10,000 patients. Without accounting for onset-to-IVT time, IV alteplase plus thrombectomy seemed cost-effective in 13 countries (INMB: $85-$3,618; 50-65% probability of cost-effectiveness) and not cost-effective in the United States, China, and Vietnam, with modest health gains (0.06-0.08 QALYs per patient). Time-stratified analyses revealed that IVT plus thrombectomy was cost-effective in 16 countries when onset-to-IVT time was <140 minutes (INMB: $615-$30,645; 82%-98% probability) and at 140-169 minutes (INMB: $86-$16,918; 51%-77% probability). However, IV alteplase plus thrombectomy was no longer cost-effective in 8 countries at 170-199 minutes. Universally, the INMB was negative for onset-to-IVT times exceeding 200 minutes. Cost-effectiveness of IV alteplase plus thrombectomy varies per country and onset-to-IVT time. IV alteplase plus thrombectomy is cost-effective when IVT can be administered within 170 minutes from symptom onset. Cost-effectiveness of IV alteplase plus thrombectomy diminishes progressively with longer onset-to-IVT times and becomes detrimental after 200 minutes.
items.summary_ja:
背景：大血管閉塞脳卒中患者において、血栓回収療法（thrombectomy）前のアルテプラーゼによる静脈内血栓溶解療法（IVT）の効果は、治療開始までの時間に依存するが、これまで発症から治療開始までの時間を考慮した費用対効果分析はなかった。  
方法：16か国の血栓回収可能施設に直接搬送された患者を対象に、IVアルテプラーゼ＋血栓回収療法と血栓回収療法単独の費用対効果を、発症からIVT開始までの時間別（<140分、140-169分、170-199分、≥200分）にメタ解析とマルコフモデルで評価。効果は6つの臨床試験の個別患者データから取得し、費用は文献レビューに基づく。  
結果：発症からIVT開始まで140分未満では16か国すべてでIVT併用が費用対効果的（INMB：615～30,645ドル、確率82～98％）。140～169分でも多くの国で費用対効果が認められたが、170～199分では8か国で費用対効果が消失。200分以上では全ての国で費用対効果がマイナスとなった。  
結論：IVアルテプラーゼ併用血栓回収療法は、発症からIVT開始まで170分以内であれば費用対効果的であるが、時間経過とともに効果が減少し、200分を超えると逆効果となる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、大血管閉塞脳卒中患者における血栓回収療法（thrombectomy）前のアルテプラーゼ静注療法（IVT）の費用対効果を、発症から治療開始までの時間別に16か国で評価した。発症からIVT開始が170分以内の場合、IVT併用は多くの国で費用対効果が高いが、170分を超えると効果が低下し、200分以上では逆効果となることが示された。治療開始時間が費用対効果を左右する重要因子である。

items.title: A Nationwide Study of Pyruvate Dehydrogenase Complex Deficiency in Sweden: Epidemiology, Genotype-Phenotype Correlations, and Survival.
items.abstract: Pyruvate dehydrogenase complex (PDHc) deficiency is a potentially treatable neurodegenerative genetic disorder. It represents a common cause of mitochondrial disease. Most published reports are limited to single cases, and population-based data are lacking. The objective of this study was to investigate the prevalence, incidence, and life expectancy and to explore genotype-phenotype correlations, clinical onset, and disease course. We conducted a nationwide, population-based epidemiologic cohort study with retrospective, longitudinal, and cross-sectional components. The cohort included all individuals residing in Sweden who were diagnosed between 2003 and 2022. A total of 54 patients (35 female patients) were identified, corresponding to a birth prevalence of 2.43 per 100,000 live births (95% CI 1.86-3.17) and a point prevalence of 0.44 per 100,000 population (95% CI 0.40-0.65). Eight patients (15%) died during the study period. The primary causes of death were congenital lactic acidosis (n = 4), stroke (n = 2), and infection (n = 2). We identified 35 pathogenic variants, including 11 not previously reported. X-linked  This nationwide, population-based study reports on the occurrence and survival of PDHc deficiency. items.summary_ja:
背景：ピルビン酸デヒドロゲナーゼ複合体（PDHc）欠損症は、治療可能な神経変性遺伝疾患であり、ミトコンドリア病の主要な原因の一つであるが、これまでの報告は単一症例が多く、全国規模の疫学データは不足していた。  
方法：スウェーデン国内に居住し、2003年から2022年にPDHc欠損症と診断された全患者を対象に、後ろ向きかつ縦断的、横断的な全国人口ベースの疫学コホート研究を実施した。  
結果：54名（女性35名）が特定され、出生時有病率は10万人あたり2.43（95%CI 1.86-3.17）、ポイント有病率は10万人あたり0.44（95%CI 0.40-0.65）であった。研究期間中に8名（15%）が死亡し、主な死因は先天性乳酸アシドーシス（4例）、脳卒中（2例）、感染症（2例）であった。35種類の病原性変異を同定し、そのうち11変異は新規報告であった。  
結論：本研究はPDHc欠損症の全国規模の発生率と生存率を明らかにし、遺伝子型・性別・表現型の相違を示した。
items.summary_short_ja: スウェーデンにおけるピルビン酸デヒドロゲナーゼ複合体（PDHc）欠損症の全国調査で、出生頻度は10万出生あたり2.43例、有病率は10万人あたり0.44例と報告された。54例中8例が死亡し、主な死因は先天性乳酸アシドーシス、脳卒中、感染症であった。35の病的変異が同定され、そのうち11は新規で、遺伝子型・性別・表現型の関連性も示された。

items.title: Outcomes After Minor Ischemic Stroke in Older Patients Treated With IV Thrombolysis vs Standard of Care in the TEMPO-2 Trial.
items.abstract: There are few high-quality data on thrombolysis outcomes in the oldest patients, especially for minor stroke. We examined safety and efficacy outcomes of thrombolysis in patients older than 80 years, compared with those ≤80 years, in the Tenecteplase Versus Standard of care for Minor Ischaemic Stroke With Proven Occlusion (TEMPO-2) trial. In this post hoc analysis of the TEMPO-2 randomized controlled trial, we compared outcomes and adverse events in patients with minor stroke and symptomatic intracranial occlusion or focal perfusion lesion within 12 hours of symptom onset, assigned to tenecteplase vs nonthrombolytic standard of care, in those >80 years and ≤80 years. The primary outcome was responder analysis of the 90-day modified Rankin Scale (responder was mRS = 0-1 if premorbid mRS = 0-1, 0-2 if premorbid mRS = 2). Secondary outcomes included neurologic recovery according to the NIH Stroke Scale (NIHSS) at 5 days/discharge, vessel recanalization, Lawton Instrumental Activities of Daily Living Scale, EuroQol-5 Dimension (EQ-5D), and adverse events. We used mixed-effects Poisson, ordinal logistic, and quantile regression as appropriate, adjusted for sex, baseline NIHSS, and treatment assignment as fixed-effects and enrolling site as random effects. Among 884 patients in the intention-to-treat analysis (208 [23.5%] >80 years, 365 [41.6%] female). Significant interactions between age and treatment were observed for mRS responder, mRS 0-1, return to baseline function, EQ-5D index, and vessel recanalization. Patients >80 years generally fared worse with tenecteplase for mRS outcomes (mRS 0-1 in 49 [46.2%] vs 61 [59.8%] with control, adjusted risk ratio [aRR] 0.83, 95% CI 0.72-0.97), while among patients ≤80 years, there was no significant difference (249 [76.4%] vs 260 [74.7%], aRR 1.01, 95% CI 0.98-1.03). However, in both age groups, patients were more likely to achieve recanalization of visible occlusions (aRR ≤80 years 2.06, 95% CI 1.60-2.65, >80 years 2.77, 95% CI 2.21-3.47) and NIHSS = 0 at 5 days/discharge when assigned to tenecteplase (aRR ≤80 years 1.14, 95% CI 1.04-1.26, >80 years 1.21, 95% CI 1.10-1.33). Serious adverse events (SAEs) were more frequent with tenecteplase among patients >80 years (risk ratio 2.29, 95% CI 1.27-4.13), particularly hemorrhages and stroke progression/recurrence (any extra/intracranial hemorrhage in 5 [4.7%] vs 0 with standard of care,  Older patients (>80 years) with minor stroke and visible occlusion or perfusion lesion assigned to tenecteplase were more likely to achieve recanalization of occlusions and short-term neurologic recovery, as were younger patients, but they experienced worse 90-day outcomes with more frequent hemorrhagic and stroke progression/recurrence-related SAEs. Overall, these results, while post hoc, do not support thrombolysis for minor strokes in older patients. ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT02398656. This study provides Class III evidence that in patients >80 years with minor stroke and visible occlusion or perfusion lesion, IV thrombolysis with tenecteplase is associated with worse functional outcomes at 90 days compared with nonthrombolytic standard of care therapies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：高齢者の軽度虚血性脳卒中に対する血栓溶解療法の安全性・有効性に関する高品質データは少ない。  
方法：TEMPO-2試験の事後解析として、80歳超と80歳以下の軽度脳卒中患者を対象に、テネクテプラーゼ（血栓溶解薬）投与群と非血栓溶解標準治療群で90日後の機能的回復（修正Rankinスケール：mRS）や神経学的回復、血管再開通率、副作用を比較した。  
結果：884例中、208例が80歳超。80歳超群ではテネクテプラーゼ投与により血管再開通率と短期神経回復は改善したが、90日後の機能的回復は標準治療群より劣り（mRS 0-1：46.2% vs 59.8%、調整リスク比0.83）、重篤な有害事象（特に出血や脳卒中悪化）が増加した。一方、80歳以下群では機能的回復に有意差はなかったが、再開通率と神経回復は改善した。  
結論：80歳超の軽度脳卒中患者に対するテネクテプラーゼによる血栓溶解療法は、短期的な血管再開通や神経回復は促進するものの、90日後の機能的予後は悪化し、有害事象も増加するため推奨されない。
items.summary_short_ja: TEMPO-2試験の後解析で、80歳超の軽度虚血性脳卒中患者におけるテネクテプラーゼ静注療法と標準治療の比較を行った。80歳超群は血管再開通や短期神経回復は認められたが、90日後の機能回復は劣り、出血や脳卒中再発など重篤な有害事象が多発した。一方、80歳以下群では機能回復に差はなかった。高齢軽度脳卒中への血栓溶解療法は推奨されない。

items.title: Impact of Basal Ganglia Perivascular Spaces on Ischemic and Hemorrhagic Risks in Patients Taking Antithrombotic Therapies.
items.abstract: Enlarged perivascular spaces (ePVSs) are considered to increase the risk of stroke. However, data regarding the benefits and risks of antithrombotic therapy in patients with ePVSs are currently limited. This study assessed the association between ePVSs and the risks of hemorrhagic or ischemic events in patients taking antithrombotic agents. This prospective, multicenter observational study enrolled patients with cerebrovascular or cardiovascular diseases who had newly started or were continuing to take oral antithrombotic agents at 52 hospitals across Japan between 2016 and 2019. Baseline multimodal MRI was performed for all of the study participants. The images were then centrally evaluated for cerebral small vessel disease (SVD), including white matter hyperintensities, cerebral microbleeds, lacunes, and basal ganglia-enlarged perivascular spaces (BGPVSs). BGPVSs were categorized as 0, 1-10, 11-20, or ≥21. Outcomes included major bleeding, intracranial hemorrhage, ischemic events, ischemic stroke, and mortality. Multivariable Cox proportional hazards models were used for the BGPVSs (in categorical and ordinal forms), adjusted for patient demographics, vascular risk factors, and other SVD markers. Of the total 5,065 patients (1,663 women; median age 74 [interquartile range 67-81] years), antiplatelets and anticoagulants were administered at the baseline to 3,820 (75.4%) and 1,502 (29.7%) patients, respectively. Their BGPVS distributions were as follows: 0, 475 (9.4%); 1-10, 2,615 (51.6%); 11-20, 1,267 (25.0%); and 21+, 708 patients (14.0%). Over a median follow-up period of 2.0 (interquartile range 1.8-2.0) years, we noted 266 ischemic events, 188 ischemic strokes, 92 major bleeding events, 54 intracranial hemorrhages, and 198 deaths. Higher BGPVS was associated with an increased risk of major bleeding (BGPVS ≥21: adjusted hazard ratio [aHR] 4.04, 95% CI 1.17-13.92; per-unit increase: aHR 1.38, 95% CI 1.07-1.77) and ischemic stroke (BGPVS ≥21: aHR 2.58, 95% CI 1.21-5.50; per-unit increase: aHR 1.28, 95% CI 1.07-1.53) but was not significantly associated with higher risks of ischemic events, intracranial hemorrhage, or mortality. Higher BGPVS burdens are associated with higher risks of ischemic stroke and major bleeding in patients receiving antithrombotic therapy. BGPVSs may serve as useful imaging biomarkers for vascular risk assessment and personalized therapy.
items.summary_ja:
背景：拡大した基底核周囲血管腔（BGPVSs）は脳卒中リスク増加とされるが、抗血栓療法患者におけるその意義は不明である。  
方法：2016～2019年に日本の52病院で、抗血栓薬を新規または継続服用中の脳・心血管疾患患者5,065名を対象に前向き多施設観察研究を実施。ベースラインで多モーダルMRIを撮影し、白質病変や微小出血、ラクーン、BGPVSsを評価。BGPVSsは0、1-10、11-20、21以上に分類。主要評価項目は大出血、頭蓋内出血、虚血性イベント、虚血性脳卒中、死亡。多変量Cox回帰分析でリスクを検討。  
結果：中央値2年の追跡で、266件の虚血イベント、188件の虚血性脳卒中、92件の大出血、54件の頭蓋内出血、198件の死亡を確認。BGPVSsが21以上の群は大出血（調整ハザード比4.04）および虚血性脳卒中（同2.58）のリスクが有意に増加。虚血イベント全体や頭蓋内出血、死亡リスクとは関連しなかった。  
結論：抗血栓療法患者において、BGPVSsの負荷増加は虚血性脳卒中および大出血リスクの上昇と関連し、血管リスク評価や個別化治療のための有用な画像バイオマーカーとなり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、抗血栓療法を受ける患者における基底核周囲血管腔拡大（BGPVS）と虚血性・出血性リスクの関連を検討した。5,065例を対象に2年間追跡し、BGPVSの増加は虚血性脳卒中および主要出血リスクの上昇と有意に関連したが、全体の虚血イベントや頭蓋内出血、死亡リスクとは関連しなかった。BGPVSは血管リスク評価や個別化治療の有用な画像バイオマーカーとなり得る。

items.title: Systolic Blood Pressure Trajectory and Outcomes in Acute Intracerebral Hemorrhage: Pooled Analysis of the 4 INTERACT and ATACH-II Clinical Trials.
items.abstract: While moderate and rapid systolic blood pressure (SBP) lowering was associated with better functional outcomes after intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH), large reductions in SBP within 1 hour, for example, reductions from >200 to <140 mm Hg, diminished or even reversed these beneficial effects. We aimed to define the optimal trajectory of SBP control in relation to favorable functional outcomes after acute ICH. We conducted a pooled analysis of individual patient-level data from all 4 Intensive Blood Pressure Reduction in Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage Trial (INTERACT) and second Antihypertensive Treatment of Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage (ATACH-II) trials, which were international, randomized, open-label, blinded, end point-assessed, controlled trials that determined the effectiveness of early intensive SBP control in acute ICH. Latent class analysis grouped SBP trajectories over the first 24 hours (9 measurements) into defined clusters. The primary outcome was functional recovery at 90 days after randomization, defined as modified Rankin Scale (mRS) scores of 3-6. Logistic regression models with adjustment for baseline covariates and trial were used to determine associations between SBP cluster trajectories and outcomes in INTERACT, with validation in ATACH-II. A total of 11,269 patients (INTERACT n = 10,269; ATACH-II n = 1,000; mean age 62.4 years; female 36.4%) with at least 1 postrandomization SBP reading were included. Six SBP trajectories were identified: low, moderate-to-low, moderate, high, high-to-moderate, and high-to-low. Compared with the low SBP group, associations with poor functional outcome (mRS scores 3-6) increased progressively across other groups in INTERACT ( Distinct SBP trajectories over 24 hours defined prognosis after ICH, with a severe hypertensive group having the highest odds of death or disability, regardless of the BP-lowering strategy used. These findings highlight the importance of well-controlled but tailored SBP management strategies after ICH. This study provides Class III evidence that distinct SBP trajectories over 24 hours are associated with prognosis after acute ICH, with a severe hypertensive group having the highest odds of poor functional outcome, regardless of the BP-lowering strategy used. (INTERACT1 NCT00226096; INTERACT2 NCT00716079; INTERACT3 NCT03209258; INTERACT4 NCT03790800; ATACH-2 NCT01176565).
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性脳内出血（ICH）後の収縮期血圧（SBP）管理は機能的予後に影響を与えるが、過度な急激な血圧低下は逆効果となる可能性がある。最適なSBP制御の軌跡を明らかにすることを目的とした。  
方法：4つの国際的ランダム化比較試験（INTERACT1-4およびATACH-II）から個別患者データを統合解析し、発症後24時間のSBP変動パターンを潜在クラス分析で6群に分類。90日後の機能的回復（修正Rankinスケール3-6）との関連を多変量ロジスティック回帰で検討し、INTERACTで解析後、ATACH-IIで検証した。  
結果：11,269例（平均年齢62.4歳、女性36.4%）を解析。SBP軌跡は「低値」「中等度から低値」「中等度」「高値」「高値から中等度」「高値から低値」の6群に分類された。低SBP群と比較し、高SBP群ほど機能障害リスクが増加し、特に重度高血圧群は死亡または障害のオッズが最も高かった。  
結論：ICH後24時間のSBP軌跡は予後を左右し、過度な高血圧は不良転帰のリスクを高める。血圧管理は個別化しつつ適切にコントロールすることが重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性脳内出血（ICH）患者11,269例のデータを4つの国際臨床試験から統合解析し、24時間の収縮期血圧（SBP）変動パターンを6群に分類した。低SBP群と比較し、高SBP群は機能的回復不良（mRS 3-6）のリスクが有意に高く、急激な大幅降圧は利益を減少させた。適切かつ個別化されたSBP管理がICH後の予後改善に重要であることを示した。

items.title: Competing Stroke Etiologies and Outcomes After Breakthrough Ischemic Stroke on Oral Anticoagulants in Patients With Atrial Fibrillation.
items.abstract: Patients with atrial fibrillation (AF) who experience an ischemic stroke despite oral anticoagulation (OAC) face a high risk of recurrence and bleeding. We aimed to compare 90-day outcomes between patients with and without competing stroke etiologies after a breakthrough ischemic stroke while on OAC for AF. ASPERA-R retrospectively enrolled adults (>18 years) with AF who experienced a breakthrough ischemic stroke, defined as either first or recurrent event, occurring on continuous OAC (last intake ≤48 hours), across 35 centers from February 2020 to February 2025. Patients' eligibility required imaging-confirmed ischemic stroke, baseline vessel imaging, and a standardized 90-day follow-up. Patients with inadequate anticoagulant dosing or poor adherence were excluded. Competing etiologies were defined as any additional mechanism coexisting with cardioembolism and plausibly contributing to the index stroke. The primary outcome was 90-day recurrent ischemic stroke; secondary outcomes included modified Rankin Scale shift, myocardial infarction, and vascular and all-cause death. Bleedings were also evaluated. We performed inverse probability weighting to balance baseline covariates and applied Cox or regression models to compare outcomes. Among 1,649 patients (mean age 78 years, 47.8% male), 24.3% had competing etiologies, most commonly large artery atherosclerosis (59.9%). Considering the weighted population, 90-day recurrent ischemic stroke occurred more often in those with competing etiologies (6.0% vs 2.7%; adjusted hazard ratio [aHR] 2.62, 95% CI 2.01-3.42;  One in 4 patients with AF and breakthrough ischemic stroke on OAC had competing etiologies, most often large artery atherosclerosis. These patients showed higher risk of recurrent stroke, functional dependence, mortality, and bleeding, highlighting the need for development of individualized secondary prevention. Main study limitations include observational retrospective design and incomplete data on on-treatment anticoagulation quality. ClinicalTrials.gov NCT06823466.
items.summary_ja:
背景：心房細動（AF）患者が経口抗凝固薬（OAC）服用中に虚血性脳卒中を発症すると、再発や出血リスクが高い。本研究は、OAC服用中に脳卒中を起こしたAF患者において、心原性塞栓症以外の競合する脳卒中原因（競合病因）の有無による90日後の転帰を比較することを目的とした。

方法：35施設で2020年2月から2025年2月までに、OACを継続服用（最終服用48時間以内）し、画像診断で虚血性脳卒中が確認された成人AF患者1,649例を後ろ向きに登録。抗凝固薬の適正投与・服薬遵守が確認された症例を対象とし、競合病因は心原性塞栓症に加えて脳卒中に寄与すると考えられる他の病態と定義。主要評価項目は90日以内の再発虚血性脳卒中、二次評価項目に機能障害（修正Rankin尺度）、心筋梗塞、血管死・全死亡、出血を含む。

結果：対象患者の24.3％に競合病因が認められ、そのうち59.9％が大動脈硬化症であった。競合病因群は非競合群に比べ、90日以内の再発虚血性脳卒中発生率が6.0％対2.7％（調整ハザード比2.62、95％CI 2.01-3.42）と有意に高く、機能依存度の増加、死亡率および出血リスクも高かった。

結論：AF患者のOAC服用中の突破性虚血性脳卒中の約4分の1に競合病因が存在し、特に大動脈硬化症が多い。これら患者は再発リスクや合併症が高いため、個別化された二次予防戦略の開発が必要である。研究は後ろ向き観察研究であり、抗凝固薬の治療品質データが不完全な点が限界である。
items.summary_short_ja: 心房細動患者の抗凝固療法中に発症した脳梗塞（突破性脳梗塞）では、約4分の1に心原性塞栓症以外の競合する病因（主に大動脈硬化症）が存在した。これらの患者は90日以内の再発脳梗塞リスクや機能障害、死亡率、出血リスクが有意に高く、個別化された二次予防の重要性が示された。ただし観察研究で抗凝固管理の詳細が不十分な点が限界である。

items.title: Associations of Accelerated Biological Aging With the Presence and Longitudinal Progression of Cerebral Small Vessel Disease.
items.abstract: Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) is a major cause of dementia and stroke, typically identified by lesions such as white matter hyperintensity (WMH), lacunes, cerebral microbleeds (CMBs), enlarged perivascular spaces, and brain atrophy. Biomarker-based biological age (BA), derived from routinely measured clinical indicators and largely reflecting vascular and metabolic physiologic burden, may provide complementary information beyond chronological age. The aim of this study was to investigate the associations between BA residual and both the presence and progression of CSVD and its neuroimaging manifestations. In the population-based Polyvascular Evaluation for Cognitive Impairment and Vascular Events cohort, participants underwent brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) at baseline (2017-2019) and at follow-up (2022-2024). BA was estimated using 3 established methods: PhenoAge, Klemera-Doubal method, and homeostatic dysregulation. Progression of CSVD and its imaging markers, including new lacunes, new CMBs, progression of enlarged perivascular spaces in the basal ganglia (BG-EPVS), and progression of WMHs, was assessed. Associations between BA residual and progression of CSVD were analyzed using logistic or ordinal logistic regression models, as appropriate. A total of 3,050 participants were included at baseline (mean age 61.22 ± 6.67 years; 53.51% female); 2,662 completed follow-up MRI over a median of 4.7 years, and 388 were lost to follow-up. Higher BA residual, particularly KDMAge and PhenoAge residual, was associated with greater CSVD burden at baseline and follow-up. Moreover, KDMAge residual was positively associated with the progression of total CSVD burden (odds ratio [OR] = 1.18, 95% CI 1.08-1.30;  This community-based cohort study demonstrated that BA residuals, particularly KDMAge and PhenoAge, were associated with higher odds of CSVD progression, especially with development of new lacunes and new CMBs. Biomarker-based BA residual may help identify individuals at higher risk of clinically relevant CSVD progression. Future studies with longer follow-up periods and more diverse cohorts are warranted to validate these findings.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳の小血管病変（CSVD）は認知症や脳卒中の主要因であり、白質病変（WMH）、ラクーン、微小出血（CMBs）などの画像所見で評価される。生物学的年齢（BA）は血管・代謝負荷を反映し、実年齢を超えたリスク評価に有用と考えられている。  
方法：認知機能障害と血管イベントを対象とした地域住民コホート（Polyvascular Evaluation）にて、3,050名の参加者が2017-2019年に脳MRIを受け、約4.7年後に2,662名が再検査。BAはPhenoAge、Klemera-Doubal法（KDMAge）、ホメオスタシス異常の3手法で算出。CSVDの進行（新規ラクーン、新規CMBs、基底核の拡大血管周囲腔、WMH進行）との関連を回帰分析で検討。  
結果：KDMAgeおよびPhenoAgeのBA残差が高いほど、ベースラインおよび追跡時のCSVD負荷が大きく、特に新規ラクーンや新規CMBsの進行と有意に関連（KDMAge残差のCSVD進行に対するオッズ比1.18、95％CI 1.08-1.30）。  
結論：BA残差はCSVDの存在および進行リスクを示唆し、臨床的に重要なCSVD進行の早期発見に役立つ可能性がある。今後はより長期かつ多様な集団での検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、バイオマーカーに基づく生物学的年齢（BA）が脳小血管病（CSVD）の存在および進行と関連するかを検討した。3050名の地域住民を対象にMRIでCSVD指標を評価し、3種類のBA推定法で解析。特にKDMAgeとPhenoAgeのBA残差がCSVDの負荷および新たなラクーンや微小出血の進行と有意に関連した。BA残差はCSVDリスク評価に有用であり、さらなる長期・多様な集団での検証が必要である。

items.title: Functional Outcomes After Intensive Blood Pressure Reduction in Deep and Lobar Intracerebral Hemorrhage.
items.abstract: Intensive blood pressure (BP) reduction may reduce the risk of poor functional outcomes in patients with acute intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH). Whether these potential benefits apply similarly to lobar and deep ICH, 2 biologically and clinically distinct subtypes, remains uncertain. We tested the hypothesis that intensive BP reduction has differential effects on functional outcomes based on ICH location. We performed a stepwise meta-analysis, stratified by ICH location, of 3 landmark randomized clinical trials of intensive BP reduction: Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage (ATACH-2), Intensive Blood Pressure Reduction in Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage Trial 2 (INTERACT2), and INTERACT3. Step 1 pooled ATACH-2 and INTERACT2 (3-month outcomes; intensive BP lowering only). Step 2 added INTERACT3 (6-month outcomes; care bundle protocol with intensive BP lowering plus glucose management, antipyresis, and anticoagulant reversal). For ATACH-2, we used pooled results from individual patient data (adjusted for age, Glasgow Coma Scale score, and presence of intraventricular hemorrhage), whereas for INTERACT2 and INTERACT3, we used their pooled, publicly available results. Our exposure of interest contrasted intensive systolic BP targets <140 mm Hg vs standard care 140-180 mm Hg. Our outcome of interest was poor functional outcome, defined as a modified Rankin Scale score of 4-6 in ATACH-2 and INTERACT3 and of 3-6 in INTERACT2. Step 1 included a total of 2,983 patients with deep and 537 patients with lobar ICH (mean age 63 y/o, 37% female). Intensive BP reduction was not associated with a significant difference in poor functional outcome for either deep (odds ratio [OR] 0.89; 95% CI 0.40-1.98;  In this stepwise meta-analysis of 3 landmark ICH trials, intensive BP reduction did not demonstrate a significant benefit in either deep or lobar ICH. Although our estimates did not reach statistical significance, the direction of effect in deep ICH and the substantial heterogeneity across trials, particularly with the inclusion of INTERACT3, limit firm conclusions. Given these uncertainties and the biological distinctions between deep and lobar ICH, future well-powered studies specifically designed to test whether intensive BP reduction has differential effects by hematoma location are warranted.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性脳内出血（ICH）患者における集中的な血圧（BP）低下は、機能的予後の改善に寄与する可能性があるが、深部ICHと葉状ICHという異なる病態に対して効果が同等かは不明である。  
方法：ATACH-2、INTERACT2、INTERACT3の3つのランダム化臨床試験を対象に、ICHの部位別（深部・葉状）に集中的BP低下（収縮期血圧<140mmHg）と標準治療（140-180mmHg）を比較する段階的メタ解析を実施した。評価指標は修正Rankinスケールによる機能的予後不良である。  
結果：計3,520例（深部2,983例、葉状537例）を解析したが、深部・葉状いずれのICHにおいても集中的BP低下は有意な予後改善を示さなかった（深部ICHのオッズ比0.89、95%信頼区間0.40-1.98）。ただし、試験間の異質性やINTERACT3の介入内容の違いにより結論は限定的である。  
結論：深部・葉状ICHに対する集中的BP低下の効果は明確でなく、両者の生物学的差異を踏まえたさらなる大規模試験が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性脳内出血（ICH）患者における集中的な血圧低下の効果を、深部型と葉状型で比較した3つの大規模試験のメタ解析を実施した。結果、深部・葉状いずれのICHでも集中的血圧管理は機能的予後の有意な改善を示さなかった。ただし、深部ICHでの効果方向や試験間の異質性が大きく、明確な結論は困難である。今後、ICH部位別の効果を検証する十分な規模の研究が必要とされる。

items.summary_ja:
背景：大気中の微小粒子状物質（PM2.5）とその特定成分が、脳卒中の再発および二次的な罹患・死亡に与える影響は明確でない。  
方法：中国の第三回全国脳卒中レジストリに登録された初回脳卒中患者11,491名（平均年齢61.5歳、男性68.1%）のデータを用い、2023年3月まで追跡調査を実施した。大気中のPM2.5濃度およびその成分と再発脳卒中、二次的罹患・死亡との関連を解析した。  
結果：長期的なPM2.5曝露は再発脳卒中のリスク増加と有意に関連し、特に特定のPM2.5成分がこれらのリスクに強く影響を及ぼすことが示された。  
結論：PM2.5およびその特定成分への長期曝露は脳卒中患者の再発および二次的な健康悪化リスクを高めるため、公衆衛生対策として大気汚染の管理が重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、中国の初回脳卒中患者11,491名（平均年齢61.5歳）を対象に、大気中の微小粒子状物質（PM2.5）とその特定成分が再発脳卒中および二次的な罹患・死亡率に与える影響を調査した。長期的なPM2.5曝露が再発リスクおよび二次的合併症の増加と関連することを明らかにし、大気汚染対策の重要性を示唆している。

items.title: Tenecteplase for Acute Non-Large Vessel Occlusion 4.5 to 24 Hours After Ischemic Stroke: The OPTION Randomized Clinical Trial.
items.abstract: The efficacy and safety of intravenous tenecteplase in non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke beyond 4.5 hours after symptom onset remain uncertain. To assess the efficacy and safety of intravenous tenecteplase administered 4.5 to 24 hours after stroke onset in patients with non-large vessel occlusion and salvageable brain tissue. This randomized, open-label, blinded end-point clinical trial was conducted at 48 centers in China. A total of 566 patients with non-large vessel occlusion stroke and evidence of potentially salvageable tissue determined on perfusion imaging presenting within 4.5 to 24 hours of the time last seen well were recruited between June 2, 2023, and August 4, 2025 (final follow-up, October 28, 2025). Patients were randomly assigned 1:1 using a minimization algorithm to receive intravenous tenecteplase (0.25 mg/kg; maximum dose, 25 mg; n = 282) or standard medical treatment (n = 284). The primary efficacy outcome was an excellent functional outcome, defined as a score of 0 or 1 on the modified Rankin Scale at 90 days. Safety outcomes included symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage within 36 hours and mortality within 90 days. Among the 570 patients randomized, 566 were included in the primary analysis (median age, 68 [IQR, 59-75] years; 196 female [34.6%]). An excellent functional outcome was observed in 123 of 282 patients (43.6%) in the tenecteplase group and 97 of 284 (34.2%) in the control group (risk ratio, 1.28 [95% CI, 1.04-1.57]; P = .02). The incidence of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage at 2.8% was higher with tenecteplase than with standard medical treatment at 0% (risk difference, 2.85% [95% CI, 1.16%-5.54%]; P = .004), and the mortality at 90 days was 5.0% and 3.2%, respectively (risk ratio, 1.57 [95% CI, 0.69-3.57]; P = .28). Among patients with non-large vessel occlusion acute ischemic stroke and salvageable brain tissue, intravenous tenecteplase administered 4.5 to 24 hours after onset resulted in a greater likelihood of an excellent functional outcome at 90 days than standard care but had an increased risk of symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage. ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT05752916.
items.summary_ja:
背景：発症後4.5時間を超える非大血管閉塞型急性虚血性脳卒中に対する静脈内テネクテプラーゼの有効性と安全性は不明であった。  
方法：中国の48施設で、発症後4.5～24時間以内に救済可能な脳組織を有する非大血管閉塞脳卒中患者566名を対象に、テネクテプラーゼ投与群（0.25 mg/kg、最大25 mg、282名）と標準治療群（284名）に1:1で無作為割付けし、90日後の機能的良好転帰（修正Rankinスケール0または1）を主要評価項目とした。  
結果：テネクテプラーゼ群の43.6%が良好転帰を示し、標準治療群の34.2%を有意に上回った（リスク比1.28、P=0.02）。一方、症候性頭蓋内出血はテネクテプラーゼ群で2.8%、標準治療群で0%と有意に増加（P=0.004）し、90日死亡率は両群で有意差なかった。  
結論：非大血管閉塞型脳卒中患者において、発症後4.5～24時間の間にテネクテプラーゼを投与すると、機能的良好転帰の可能性が高まるが、症候性頭蓋内出血リスクも増加することが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 非大血管閉塞の急性虚血性脳卒中患者を対象に、発症4.5～24時間後に静脈内テネクテプラーゼ投与の有効性と安全性を検証した。566例を無作為に分け、テネクテプラーゼ群は90日後の優れた機能的回復率が43.6％で対照群の34.2％を上回ったが、症候性頭蓋内出血リスクも2.8％と有意に増加した。死亡率に差はなかった。

items.title: Case Fatality of Subarachnoid Hemorrhage by Aneurysm Location: A Population-Based Study From Finland and New Zealand.
items.abstract: According to region-specific hospital-based studies, the location of ruptured intracranial aneurysm (RIA) influences the case fatality rate (CFR) of aneurysmal subarachnoid hemorrhage (SAH). However, little is known about whether CFRs vary by RIA location in population-based studies that include prehospital SAH deaths. We assessed whether CFRs and CFR-trends differ by RIA location using whole population data from Finland and New Zealand. We used externally validated administrative databases to identify all nonhospitalized and hospitalized SAH cases in Finland and New Zealand from 2001 to 2017. Using the ICD-10, we categorized RIAs into anterior communicating artery (Acom) (ICD-10 I60.2), internal carotid artery (ICA) (I60.0/I60.3), middle cerebral artery (MCA) (I60.1), and vertebrobasilar artery (VBA) (I60.4/I60.5) locations. To validate the location-specific SAH diagnoses, we used external hospital- and population-based datasets and autopsy data. We calculated sudden death rates (those occurring before admission to a ward) and overall 30-day CFRs, and computed age-, sex, and country-adjusted risk ratios using a Poisson regression model with 95% CIs. Among 13,470 SAH cases (5,056 from New Zealand; median age 58 years; 61.3% women), 26.6% had Acom, 18.4% ICA, 29.5% MCA, 11.5% VBA, and 14.0% other/unspecified RIAs. The overall 30-day CFRs were the greatest for VBA (54.1%), followed by MCA (40.5%), Acom (29.1%), and ICA (28.5%) RIAs. Location-specific sudden death rates were 33.0%, 21.6%, 11.9%, and 9.9%, respectively. Between 2001-2003 and 2015-2017, overall 30-day CFRs declined significantly for VBA (24%, 95% CI 13%-34%) and MCA (15%, 95% CI 5%-24%) RIAs. Location-specific differences in CFRs were similar between countries, but temporal decreases were observed only in Finland. Between 2001-2003 and 2014-2017, the proportion of VBA RIAs increased by 35.9% (from 10.3% to 14.0%). SAH CFRs vary significantly by RIA location, with VBA and MCA RIAs having the greatest CFRs, mainly due to high sudden death rates. It is unclear whether aneurysms with these high-risk locations could benefit from improved primary/secondary prevention or prehospital management strategies. These findings cannot be directly applied to the preventive treatment of unruptured intracranial aneurysms.
items.summary_ja:
【背景】破裂脳動脈瘤（RIA）によるくも膜下出血（SAH）の致死率（CFR）は、病院ベースの地域研究で動脈瘤の部位によって異なることが示されているが、救急搬送前の死亡例を含む人口ベースの研究は少ない。  
【方法】フィンランドとニュージーランドの全人口データ（2001～2017年）を用い、ICD-10コードでRIAを前交通動脈（Acom）、内頸動脈（ICA）、中大脳動脈（MCA）、椎骨脳底動脈（VBA）に分類。入院前突然死率と30日CFRを算出し、年齢・性別・国を調整したリスク比をポアソン回帰で分析した。  
【結果】13,470例中、VBAの30日CFRが54.1%で最も高く、次いでMCA（40.5%）、Acom（29.1%）、ICA（28.5%）であった。突然死率もVBAが最も高く33.0%。2001-2003年から2015-2017年にかけて、VBAとMCAのCFRは有意に低下したが、この傾向はフィンランドのみで観察された。VBAの割合は増加傾向にあった。  
【結論】SAHの致死率は動脈瘤の部位によって大きく異なり、特にVBAとMCAは突然死率が高い。これら高リスク部位の動脈瘤に対する予防や救急対応の改善が必要かもしれないが、未破裂動脈瘤の予防治療への直接的な示唆とはならない。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究はフィンランドとニュージーランドの全人口データを用い、破裂脳動脈瘤（RIA）の部位別にくも膜下出血（SAH）の致死率（CFR）を検討した。VBA（椎骨脳底動脈）とMCA（中大脳動脈）部位のRIAは突然死率が高く、30日CFRも最も高かった。2001-2017年でVBAとMCAのCFRは有意に減少したが、国別ではフィンランドのみで観察された。RIA部位による致死率差は大きく、予防や救急対応の改善が課題である。

items.title: Trans-Synaptic Retrograde Retinal Degeneration After Post-Chiasmatic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Empirical Evidence.
items.abstract: Retrograde trans-synaptic degeneration (RTSD) refers to the progressive loss of retinal cells following damage to the post-geniculate visual pathway. The advent of optical coherence tomography (OCT) has allowed the measurement and quantification of retinal layers, in turn providing compelling evidence of RTSD in stroke patients and highlighting that assessing the temporal and functional evolution of RTSD has important clinical implications. We conducted a systematic review up until 7th July 2025 to summarize the OCT evidence on post-stroke RTSD. Eligible articles on this topic were searched in PubMed, Web of Science, and Scopus databases. Twenty-eight papers, involving 888 patients and 624 healthy controls, were included, and their results were systematically described and qualitatively analyzed. Overall, literature shows that RTSD is a frequent outcome of post-chiasmatic strokes. RTSD is operationalized by measuring the thickness of the peripapillary retinal nerve fiber and macular layers. The latter appears to be a more robust structural biomarker, showing more consistent findings across studies, with its magnitude better correlating with patients' visual field defects. RTSD starts early after the stroke's onset and progresses for several years, with severity depending on lesion location and extension. Future investigations are needed to draw more robust conclusions on RTSD temporal dynamics, clarifying the relation between structural and functional loss. Current literature highlights the need to consider the RTSD among the primary outcomes of post-chiasmatic stroke, given its implications on clinical management and neurorehabilitation, making the longitudinal assessment of this degenerative process crucial for prevention.
items.summary_ja: 背景：後視床視覚路損傷後に網膜細胞が進行性に失われる逆行性シナプス間変性（RTSD）が注目されている。光干渉断層計（OCT）の発展により、網膜層の計測が可能となり、脳卒中患者におけるRTSDの実証的証拠が増加している。方法：2025年7月7日までにPubMed、Web of Science、Scopusで関連論文を検索し、合計28報（患者888名、健常者624名）を対象に系統的レビューを実施した。結果：RTSDは後視床視覚路損傷後に頻繁に認められ、視神経乳頭周囲の網膜神経線維層厚および黄斑層厚の測定で評価された。特に黄斑層厚は視野欠損との相関が強く、より信頼性の高い構造的バイオマーカーであった。RTSDは発症早期から始まり数年にわたり進行し、病変の部位や範囲により重症度が異なる。結論：RTSDの時間的経過や構造的・機能的損失の関係を明確にするため、さらなる研究が必要である。RTSDは後視床視覚路損傷の主要な臨床アウトカムとして考慮すべきであり、神経リハビリテーションや予防のために長期的評価が重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 後視床視覚路損傷後に生じる逆行性経シナプス網膜変性（RTSD）は、光干渉断層計（OCT）により網膜層の厚さ測定で検出され、視野欠損と相関する重要な構造的バイオマーカーである。28報の研究（888例）から、RTSDは発症早期から進行し、病変部位や範囲により重症度が異なることが示された。RTSDの経時的評価は臨床管理や神経リハビリに不可欠であり、さらなる研究が求められる。

items.title: Baseline Cerebral Small Vessel Disease Predicting Long-Term Cognitive Decline in Transient Ischemic Attack Patients.
items.abstract: Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) is a common incidental MRI finding in patients with transient ischemic attack (TIA) and stroke and has been linked to cognitive decline. This study investigated the prevalence of CSVD imaging biomarkers in TIA patients and their association with cognitive performance over 3 years. We included 246 TIA patients from the INSPiRE-TMS study (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT01586702). CSVD was assessed on baseline 3 T MRI using a composite score (0-4) including white matter hyperintensities (WMH), lacunes, cerebral microbleeds (CMBs), and enlarged perivascular spaces (PVS). Cognitive performance was evaluated using the Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA) at baseline and annually for 3 years. At least one CSVD imaging biomarker was present in 58.5% of patients. Lacunes (36.6%) were the most common, followed by PVS (28.1%), WMH (19.5%), and CMBs (17.9%). Higher CSVD-score was independently associated with greater cognitive decline over 3 years (β = -0.52, 95% CI -0.95- -0.08, p = 0.020), along with older age (β = -0.08, 95% CI -0.13 to -0.03, p = 0.001). CMB burden was the strongest predictive component of the CSVD-score (β = 0.42, 95% CI -0.63 to -0.22, p < 0.001). CSVD-score was particularly associated with decline in the memory domain (adjusted β of -0.18, 95% CI -0.32 to -0.04, p = 0.015). CSVD imaging markers are present in over half of TIA patients and are independently associated with cognitive decline up to 3 years, with the strongest effect on memory. Whether the presence of CMBs is the strongest predictive imaging biomarker of cognitive decline in TIA patients requires confirmation in further studies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：一過性脳虚血発作（TIA）患者において、脳の小血管病変（CSVD）は認知機能低下と関連するとされるが、その長期的影響は不明である。  
方法：INSPiRE-TMS研究に参加した246名のTIA患者を対象に、ベースラインの3T MRIで白質高信号（WMH）、ラクナ梗塞、微小出血（CMB）、拡大血管周囲腔（PVS）を評価し、CSVD合成スコア（0-4）を算出。認知機能はモントリオール認知評価（MoCA）でベースラインおよび3年間毎年測定した。  
結果：58.5%の患者に少なくとも1つのCSVDマーカーを認め、ラクナ梗塞が最も多く36.6%、次いでPVS（28.1%）、WMH（19.5%）、CMB（17.9%）であった。CSVDスコアの高さは3年間の認知機能低下と独立して関連し（β＝-0.52、p＝0.020）、特に記憶機能の低下に強く影響した。CMBの負荷が最も強い予測因子であった。  
結論：TIA患者の半数以上にCSVDマーカーが存在し、これらは長期的な認知機能低下と関連する。特にCMBの存在が認知低下の強力な予測因子である可能性が示唆され、今後の検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 一過性脳虚血発作（TIA）患者246名を対象に、脳小血管病変（CSVD）のMRI所見と3年間の認知機能低下の関連を検討した。58.5％にCSVDマーカーが認められ、特に脳微小出血（CMB）が認知低下の強い予測因子であった。CSVDスコアの上昇は記憶機能を中心とした認知機能の悪化と独立して関連し、CSVDはTIA患者の長期的認知予後に重要な影響を与えることが示唆された。

items.title: Functional Outcome Following Blood Pressure Drops Within 24 Hours After Successful Mechanical Thrombectomy.
items.abstract: The optimal target blood pressure (BP) during and after mechanical thrombectomy (MT) for acute ischemic stroke remains uncertain. While BP drops during MT are associated with worse outcomes, evidence on postprocedural BP instability is limited. We aimed to assess the impact of BP drops within the first 24 hours after MT on functional outcome. Retrospective observational study analyzing data from 2 tertiary stroke centers, gathered between October 2020 and September 2022 within the German Stroke Registry Endovascular Treatment, a national prospective registry of patients receiving MT for ischemic stroke. High-resolution BP data of patients who reached successful recanalization at the end of MT (modified Thrombolysis in Cerebral Infarction [mTICI] ≥2b) were obtained using stroke unit monitoring. BP drops were defined as systolic BP decreases of ≥40 mm Hg occurring within 1 hour during the first 24 hours after groin puncture. Primary outcome was level of disability at 3 months, assessed on the modified Rankin Scale (mRS shift analysis). Secondary outcomes included early neurologic deterioration (defined as an increase of 4 or more points on the National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS) between admission and 24-hour assessment) and death at 3 months. Associations between BP drops and functional outcomes were evaluated using multivariable ordinal and binary logistic regression. Among 300 patients analyzed (median age 77 years [interquartile range (IQR) 65-83], 46.0% female, median admission NIHSS 13 points [IQR 7-17]), 123 patients (41.0%) had at least 1 drop, including 77 patients (62.6%) with 1 drop and 46 patients (37.4%) with 2 or more drops. BP drops were independently associated with worse functional outcome, both in binary (drops vs no drops; adjusted common odds ratio [OR] 1.66 [95% CI 1.02-2.70]) and count-based analysis (adjusted common OR per +1 drop; 1.33 [95% CI 1.05-1.69]). Patients with drops more often had early neurologic deterioration (22.2% vs 13.4%; adjusted OR 2.22 [95% CI 1.03-4.78]). BP drops were not associated with death at 3 months (adjusted OR 1.25, 95% CI 0.66-2.40). BP drops within 24 hours after successful MT are associated with worse functional outcome. Targeted measures to prevent or mitigate BP drops should be explored in future studies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性虚血性脳卒中に対する機械的血栓回収術（MT）中および術後の最適な血圧管理は不明であり、特に術後24時間以内の血圧低下の影響に関するエビデンスは限られている。  
方法：ドイツの2つの三次脳卒中センターで2020年10月から2022年9月までにMTを受け、成功再開通（mTICI≥2b）を達成した300例の患者データを後ろ向き観察研究で解析。術後24時間以内に1時間以内で収縮期血圧が40mmHg以上低下した場合を血圧低下と定義し、3か月後の機能的転帰（mRS）や早期神経症状悪化（NIHSSの4点以上増加）、死亡率との関連を多変量ロジスティック回帰で評価した。  
結果：41.0%の患者に血圧低下が認められ、血圧低下は3か月後の機能的転帰悪化（調整後OR 1.66）および早期神経症状悪化（22.2% vs 13.4%、調整後OR 2.22）と有意に関連したが、死亡率とは関連しなかった。  
結論：成功したMT後24時間以内の血圧低下は機能的予後悪化と関連するため、血圧低下の予防・軽減を目的とした管理戦略の検討が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性虚血性脳卒中に対する機械的血栓除去術（MT）後24時間以内の血圧低下が機能的予後に与える影響を後ろ向きに検討した。300例中41％で血圧低下が認められ、これが3か月後の障害度悪化や早期神経症状悪化と有意に関連した。一方、死亡率との関連は認められなかった。MT後の血圧低下防止が予後改善に重要であり、今後の対策検討が必要である。

items.title: Contrast-Associated Acute Kidney Injury After Thrombectomy for Ischemic Stroke: Prognostic Impact and CAN-REST Predictive Score.
items.abstract: Contrast-associated acute kidney injury (CA-AKI) is a potentially preventable complication after exposure to iodinated contrast media. In patients undergoing endovascular thrombectomy (EVT) for acute ischemic stroke (AIS), the incidence and clinical impact are poorly characterized, and no validated prediction tool is currently available. The aim of this study was to assess the incidence and prognostic significance of CA-AKI in EVT-treated patients with AIS and to develop and validate a predictive score. A retrospective, multicenter cohort study was conducted involving EVT-treated patients across 73 centers in 16 countries (January-December 2023). Inclusion criteria were age ≥18 years, absence of dialysis, availability of preprocedural and 48-hour postprocedural creatinine levels, and available 90-day follow-up (modified Rankin Scale [mRS] score). The primary outcome was CA-AKI, defined by KDIGO (Kidney Disease: Improving Global Outcomes criteria;creatinine increase ≥0.3 mg/dL or ≥1.5 times baseline, within 48 hours). Secondary outcomes were (1) in-hospital mortality, (2) 90-day mRS score, and (3) 90-day severe disability or death (mRS score >3). Logistic models assessing associations with outcomes accounted for within-center clustering by applying robust standard errors. CA-AKI prediction models were developed across imputed data sets using univariable selection ( Among 6,638 patients (median age 74 years; 48.7% male), CA-AKI occurred in 326 (4.9%) and was independently associated with in-hospital mortality (adjusted odds ratio [aOR] 2.269; 95% CI 1.615-3.190), higher 90-day mRS scores (adjusted common odds ratio 1.584; 95% CI 1.110-2.258), and 90-day severe disability or death (aOR 1.530; 95% CI 1.057-2.216). A preprocedural risk model including 12 routine clinical variables-sex, ethnicity, arterial hypertension, dyslipidemia, chronic kidney disease, antiplatelet therapy, NIH Stroke Scale score at admission, serum glucose, estimated glomerular filtration rate, hemoglobin, mean arterial pressure, and IV thrombolysis-demonstrated acceptable discrimination (area under the receiver operating characteristic curve 0.710 [95% CI 0.682-0.738]; precision-recall area under the curve 0.13 [95% CI 0.10-0.16]), good calibration (slope 0.870 [95% CI 0.759-0.928]), good overall performance (Brier score 0.045 [95% CI 0.042-0.049]). A second model that included EVT-related variables (e.g., contrast volume) showed similar performances. In this large, international cohort, CA-AKI occurred in approximately 1 in 20 EVT-treated patients with AIS and was independently associated with poor outcomes. A simple preprocedural risk score enables early identification of high-risk individuals and may support preventive strategies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性虚血性脳卒中（AIS）に対する血栓回収術（EVT）後のヨード造影剤関連急性腎障害（CA-AKI）は予防可能な合併症であるが、その発生率や臨床的影響は不明瞭であり、予測ツールも存在しない。  
方法：16か国73施設のEVT施行患者6,638例（中央値年齢74歳）を対象に、術前および術後48時間のクレアチニン値と90日後の修正Rankinスケール（mRS）を用いてCA-AKIの発生率と予後への影響を後ろ向きに解析。CA-AKIはKDIGO基準で定義。予測モデルは12の臨床変数を用いて構築・検証した。  
結果：CA-AKIは4.9%に発生し、入院中死亡（調整オッズ比2.269）、90日後の重度障害または死亡（mRS>3、aOR1.530）と有意に関連。予測モデルはROC曲線下面積0.710で良好な識別能を示した。造影剤量を含むモデルでも同様の性能を示した。  
結論：AISに対するEVT後のCA-AKIは約5%に発生し、予後不良と独立して関連する。簡便な術前リスクスコアにより高リスク患者の早期同定が可能であり、予防策の実施に有用である。
items.summary_short_ja: 虚血性脳卒中に対する血栓回収術後の造影剤関連急性腎障害（CA-AKI）は約5%に発生し、入院中死亡率や90日後の重度障害・死亡と独立して関連した。本研究は16か国73施設の6638例を対象に、12の臨床指標を用いたCA-AKI予測スコア「CAN-REST」を開発・検証し、良好な予測性能を示した。早期リスク評価により予防策の検討が期待される。

items.title: Systemic Inflammation and Recurrence After Atrial Fibrillation-Related Stroke: An Individual Participant Data Meta-Analysis.
items.abstract: The residual recurrence risk after atrial fibrillation (AF)-related stroke is high despite anticoagulation, thereby necessitating new therapies. The importance of inflammation in AF is increasingly recognized. However, patients with AF-related stroke were excluded from recent trials of anti-inflammatory therapies. It is uncertain whether associations between IL-6/high-sensitivity C-reactive protein (hsCRP) and poststroke recurrence are modified by AF status. In this study, we aimed to analyze the association between IL-6/hsCRP and recurrence according to AF history. We leveraged individual participant data from studies identified by systematic review. We analyzed associations between IL-6/hsCRP and recurrent stroke/major adverse cardiovascular events (MACEs) (defined as fatal or nonfatal recurrent stroke or major coronary events) using multivariable Cox regression analyses (conditional logistic regression for 1 study) adjusted for age, sex, index event, cardiovascular risk factors, and medication use, stratified by AF status. Data from 11 prospective studies with 10,080 patients (2,134 with AF, mean age 70 years, 59.3% male) were included. During 21,080 person-years of follow-up, 1,677 patients had MACEs and 1,342 had recurrent stroke. Inflammatory markers were higher in patients with AF, irrespective of stroke severity and timing of measurement, with elevated levels persisting well beyond the acute phase. hsCRP was associated with recurrent MACEs in patients with AF (adjusted risk ratio [aRR] 1.14, 95% CI 1.04-1.25, per log These data highlight the importance of inflammatory mechanisms in vascular recurrence irrespective of AF, provide rationale for the inclusion of patients with AF in trials of anti-inflammatory therapy, and support a selection approach in future trials based on elevated inflammatory marker levels, rather than stroke etiology alone.
items.summary_ja:
背景：心房細動（AF）関連脳卒中後の再発リスクは抗凝固療法下でも高く、新たな治療法の開発が求められている。炎症の役割がAFで注目されているが、AF関連脳卒中患者は抗炎症療法の最近の臨床試験から除外されており、IL-6や高感度C反応性タンパク（hsCRP）と再発リスクの関連がAFの有無で変わるかは不明であった。  
方法：システマティックレビューで同定した11の前向き研究（計10,080例、うち2,134例がAF患者）から個別参加者データを用い、IL-6/hsCRPと再発脳卒中および主要心血管イベント（MACE）との関連を多変量コックス回帰分析で評価し、AFの有無で層別化した。  
結果：追跡期間中（21,080人年）に1,677例がMACE、1,342例が再発脳卒中を発症。AF患者は炎症マーカー値が高く、急性期を超えて持続。hsCRPはAF患者の再発MACEと有意に関連（調整リスク比1.14、95%CI 1.04-1.25）した。  
結論：炎症機序はAFの有無にかかわらず血管再発に重要であり、AF患者も抗炎症療法試験に含めるべきである。将来の試験では脳卒中の病因ではなく、炎症マーカーの高値を基準に患者選択を行うことが推奨される。
items.summary_short_ja: 心房細動（AF）関連脳卒中後の再発リスクは抗凝固療法下でも高く、新たな治療法が求められている。本研究は、11の前向き研究10,080例の個別データを用い、炎症マーカーIL-6およびhsCRPと再発リスクの関連をAFの有無で解析した。AF患者は炎症マーカーが高値で持続し、hsCRPはAF患者の再発重大心血管イベントと有意に関連した。炎症機序の重要性を示し、AF患者の抗炎症療法試験への参加と炎症マーカーに基づく選択の必要性を支持する。

items.title: Impact of Basal Ganglia Perivascular Spaces on Ischemic and Hemorrhagic Risks in Patients Taking Antithrombotic Therapies.
items.abstract: Enlarged perivascular spaces (ePVSs) are considered to increase the risk of stroke. However, data regarding the benefits and risks of antithrombotic therapy in patients with ePVSs are currently limited. This study assessed the association between ePVSs and the risks of hemorrhagic or ischemic events in patients taking antithrombotic agents. This prospective, multicenter observational study enrolled patients with cerebrovascular or cardiovascular diseases who had newly started or were continuing to take oral antithrombotic agents at 52 hospitals across Japan between 2016 and 2019. Baseline multimodal MRI was performed for all of the study participants. The images were then centrally evaluated for cerebral small vessel disease (SVD), including white matter hyperintensities, cerebral microbleeds, lacunes, and basal ganglia-enlarged perivascular spaces (BGPVSs). BGPVSs were categorized as 0, 1-10, 11-20, or ≥21. Outcomes included major bleeding, intracranial hemorrhage, ischemic events, ischemic stroke, and mortality. Multivariable Cox proportional hazards models were used for the BGPVSs (in categorical and ordinal forms), adjusted for patient demographics, vascular risk factors, and other SVD markers. Of the total 5,065 patients (1,663 women; median age 74 [interquartile range 67-81] years), antiplatelets and anticoagulants were administered at the baseline to 3,820 (75.4%) and 1,502 (29.7%) patients, respectively. Their BGPVS distributions were as follows: 0, 475 (9.4%); 1-10, 2,615 (51.6%); 11-20, 1,267 (25.0%); and 21+, 708 patients (14.0%). Over a median follow-up period of 2.0 (interquartile range 1.8-2.0) years, we noted 266 ischemic events, 188 ischemic strokes, 92 major bleeding events, 54 intracranial hemorrhages, and 198 deaths. Higher BGPVS was associated with an increased risk of major bleeding (BGPVS ≥21: adjusted hazard ratio [aHR] 4.04, 95% CI 1.17-13.92; per-unit increase: aHR 1.38, 95% CI 1.07-1.77) and ischemic stroke (BGPVS ≥21: aHR 2.58, 95% CI 1.21-5.50; per-unit increase: aHR 1.28, 95% CI 1.07-1.53) but was not significantly associated with higher risks of ischemic events, intracranial hemorrhage, or mortality. Higher BGPVS burdens are associated with higher risks of ischemic stroke and major bleeding in patients receiving antithrombotic therapy. BGPVSs may serve as useful imaging biomarkers for vascular risk assessment and personalized therapy.
items.summary_ja:
背景：拡大した基底核周囲血管腔（BGPVSs）は脳卒中リスク増加とされるが、抗血栓療法患者におけるその影響は不明である。  
方法：2016～2019年に日本の52病院で、抗血栓薬を新規または継続服用中の脳血管・心血管疾患患者5,065名を対象に前向き多施設観察研究を実施。MRIで白質病変や微小出血、ラクーン、BGPVSsを評価し、BGPVSsを0、1-10、11-20、21以上に分類。主要出血、脳内出血、虚血イベント、虚血性脳卒中、死亡を追跡。多変量Coxモデルで解析。  
結果：中央値2年の追跡で、266件の虚血イベント、188件の虚血性脳卒中、92件の主要出血、54件の脳内出血、198件の死亡を確認。BGPVSsが21以上の群は主要出血リスク（調整ハザード比4.04）および虚血性脳卒中リスク（同2.58）が有意に増加。虚血イベント全体や脳内出血、死亡リスクとは関連しなかった。  
結論：抗血栓療法患者において高負荷のBGPVSsは虚血性脳卒中と主要出血リスクの増加と関連し、血管リスク評価や個別化治療のための有用な画像バイオマーカーとなり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、抗血栓療法を受ける脳血管・心血管疾患患者において、基底核周囲血管周囲腔（BGPVS）の拡大が虚血性脳卒中および重大出血リスクと関連することを示した。5,065例を対象に2年間追跡し、BGPVSが多いほど虚血性脳卒中と重大出血の発生率が有意に増加したが、全体の虚血イベントや頭蓋内出血、死亡リスクとは関連しなかった。BGPVSは血管リスク評価や個別化治療の指標となりうる。

items.title: Systolic Blood Pressure Trajectory and Outcomes in Acute Intracerebral Hemorrhage: Pooled Analysis of the 4 INTERACT and ATACH-II Clinical Trials.
items.abstract: While moderate and rapid systolic blood pressure (SBP) lowering was associated with better functional outcomes after intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH), large reductions in SBP within 1 hour, for example, reductions from >200 to <140 mm Hg, diminished or even reversed these beneficial effects. We aimed to define the optimal trajectory of SBP control in relation to favorable functional outcomes after acute ICH. We conducted a pooled analysis of individual patient-level data from all 4 Intensive Blood Pressure Reduction in Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage Trial (INTERACT) and second Antihypertensive Treatment of Acute Cerebral Hemorrhage (ATACH-II) trials, which were international, randomized, open-label, blinded, end point-assessed, controlled trials that determined the effectiveness of early intensive SBP control in acute ICH. Latent class analysis grouped SBP trajectories over the first 24 hours (9 measurements) into defined clusters. The primary outcome was functional recovery at 90 days after randomization, defined as modified Rankin Scale (mRS) scores of 3-6. Logistic regression models with adjustment for baseline covariates and trial were used to determine associations between SBP cluster trajectories and outcomes in INTERACT, with validation in ATACH-II. A total of 11,269 patients (INTERACT n = 10,269; ATACH-II n = 1,000; mean age 62.4 years; female 36.4%) with at least 1 postrandomization SBP reading were included. Six SBP trajectories were identified: low, moderate-to-low, moderate, high, high-to-moderate, and high-to-low. Compared with the low SBP group, associations with poor functional outcome (mRS scores 3-6) increased progressively across other groups in INTERACT ( Distinct SBP trajectories over 24 hours defined prognosis after ICH, with a severe hypertensive group having the highest odds of death or disability, regardless of the BP-lowering strategy used. These findings highlight the importance of well-controlled but tailored SBP management strategies after ICH. This study provides Class III evidence that distinct SBP trajectories over 24 hours are associated with prognosis after acute ICH, with a severe hypertensive group having the highest odds of poor functional outcome, regardless of the BP-lowering strategy used. (INTERACT1 NCT00226096; INTERACT2 NCT00716079; INTERACT3 NCT03209258; INTERACT4 NCT03790800; ATACH-2 NCT01176565).
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性脳内出血（ICH）後の収縮期血圧（SBP）管理は機能的予後に影響するが、過度の急激な血圧低下は逆効果となる可能性がある。  
方法：INTERACTおよびATACH-IIの4つの国際ランダム化比較試験から個別患者データを統合解析し、発症後24時間のSBP変動パターンを潜在クラス分析で分類。主要評価項目は90日後の修正Rankinスケール（mRS）3-6による機能的回復不良とした。ロジスティック回帰でSBP軌跡と予後の関連を検討し、INTERACTで解析後、ATACH-IIで検証を行った。  
結果：11,269例（平均年齢62.4歳、女性36.4%）を解析し、6つのSBP軌跡（低値、低中値、中値、高値、高中値、高低値）を同定。低値群と比較し、SBPが高い群ほど機能的回復不良のリスクが段階的に増加した。特に重度高血圧群は死亡または障害のリスクが最も高かった。  
結論：急性ICH後の24時間にわたるSBP軌跡は予後を予測し、過度の高血圧は不良転帰と関連する。血圧管理は個別化しつつ適切にコントロールすることが重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性脳内出血（ICH）患者11,269例を対象に、4つのINTERACT試験とATACH-II試験のデータを統合解析し、発症後24時間の収縮期血圧（SBP）変動パターンと90日後の機能的予後の関連を検討した。6つのSBP軌跡が特定され、高値持続群は死亡や障害のリスクが最も高かった。過度な急激なSBP低下は利益を減じるため、適切かつ個別化したSBP管理が重要であることを示した。

items.title: CTA-Based Plaque-RADS to Assess Etiologic Role of Nonstenotic Carotid Plaques in Patients With Embolic Stroke of Undetermined Source.
items.abstract: Nonstenotic (<50%) carotid plaques (NSCPs) are increasingly recognized as potential embolic sources in embolic stroke of undetermined source (ESUS), but their etiologic role remains uncertain because of limited data and the lack of standardized definition of high-risk plaque. We evaluated the clinical applicability and reliability of a modified CT angiography (CTA)-based Plaque-Reporting and Data System (RADS) classification for characterizing NSCPs in ESUS and examined the association between high-risk NSCPs and stroke laterality, the coexistence of competing stroke mechanisms, and the risk of stroke recurrence. We conducted a single-center cohort study (January 2016-June 2025) including consecutive ESUS patients with unilateral anterior circulation stroke and neck CTA, retrospectively and prospectively enrolled. NSCPs were classified using a modified CTA-based Plaque-RADS: (1) normal vessel wall; (2) maximum wall thickness (MWT) <3 mm; (3) MWT ≥3 mm (3ab) or ulceration (3c); (4) intraplaque hemorrhage (4a) or intraluminal thrombus (4c). Patients were stratified according to the presence of ipsilateral high-risk Plaque-RADS (categories 3-4) vs ipsilateral low-risk Plaque-RADS (categories 1-2). Inter-rater agreement for CTA-based Plaque-RADS was assessed, and associations between high-risk Plaque-RADS and stroke side, competing embolic sources, and recurrent ischemic events were evaluated with multivariable regression and survival analyses. Among 512 patients (median age 70 years, 47.8% women), 109 (21.3%) had ipsilateral high-risk and 403 (78.7%) had low-risk Plaque-RADS scores. Inter-rater agreement was excellent (Cohen κ = 0.83,  CTA-based Plaque-RADS can be reliably applied in routine clinical practice to categorize NSCPs in ESUS. Ipsilateral high-risk NSCPs are strongly associated with the index stroke side, lower prevalence of competing cardioembolic sources, and increased ipsilateral recurrence, supporting their role as a distinct causal mechanism within ESUS and underscoring the need for randomized trials on secondary prevention.
items.summary_ja:
背景：非狭窄性（50％未満）頸動脈プラーク（NSCP）が原因不明の塞栓性脳卒中（ESUS）における塞栓源として注目されているが、その病因的役割は不明確であり、高リスクプラークの標準的定義も確立していない。  
方法：単一施設で2016年1月から2025年6月までに前方循環の片側ESUS患者512例を対象に、頸部CTAを用いた修正版Plaque-RADS分類（カテゴリー1～4）でNSCPを評価し、評価者間一致度や高リスクプラーク（カテゴリー3-4）と脳卒中側、他の塞栓源の共存、再発リスクとの関連を多変量解析および生存分析で検討した。  
結果：患者の21.3％が片側に高リスクプラークを有し、評価者間一致度は極めて高かった（κ=0.83）。高リスクプラークは脳卒中発症側と強く関連し、心原性塞栓源の共存は少なく、同側の再発リスクが増加していた。  
結論：CTAベースのPlaque-RADSは臨床で信頼性高くNSCPを分類可能であり、高リスクNSCPはESUSの独立した病因機序として重要である。二次予防のための無作為化試験の必要性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、非狭窄性頸動脈プラーク（NSCP）が原因不明の塞栓性脳卒中（ESUS）に果たす役割を評価するため、修正CTAベースのPlaque-RADS分類の臨床的有用性と信頼性を検証した。512例のESUS患者を対象に解析し、高リスクNSCPは発症側の脳卒中と強く関連し、競合する塞栓源の頻度が低く、再発リスクも高いことを示した。Plaque-RADSは臨床でのNSCP評価に有効であり、二次予防のための無作為試験の必要性を示唆する。

items.title: Circulating Biomarkers of Neurodegeneration and All-Cause and Dementia-Specific Mortality.
items.abstract: Blood-based biomarkers offer a widely available, scalable, and noninvasive method to study neurodegeneration. However, the association between blood-based biomarkers of neurodegeneration and long-term risk of mortality, as well as dementia-specific mortality in a racially diverse cohort, remains understudied. The goal of this study was to determine whether baseline biomarkers of neurodegeneration are associated with long-term risk of all-cause and dementia-specific mortality in a biracial cohort. The REasons for Geographic and Racial Differences in Stroke cohort study enrolled 30,239 Black and White participants across the continental United States from 2003 to 2007, with ongoing follow-up. Plasma neurofilament light chain (NfL), total tau, glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP), and ubiquitin carboxy-terminal hydrolase L1 (UCH-L1) were measured in baseline plasma from a random sample of participants. All-cause mortality, dementia-specific mortality, cardiovascular-specific mortality, and other causes of death were adjudicated and classified using medical records, the Social Security Death Index, and the National Death Index. Cause-specific Cox regression models accounting for competing risks were used to calculate hazard ratios (HRs) of outcomes for each biomarker separately. A total of 917 participants had a mean baseline age of 67.4 years (SD 12.1), 49.4% were female, and 48.6% self-identified as Black. With a mean follow-up of 11.1 (SD 5.7) years, 51.0% (477/935) of participants died and 9.2% experienced dementia-specific mortality (86/935). No associations were observed for total tau. In fully adjusted models for other biomarkers, HRs of all-cause mortality per standard deviation increments were 1.93 (95% CI 1.48-2.52) for GFAP, 1.90 (95% CI 1.55-2.32) for NfL, and 1.23 (95% CI 1.09-1.37) for UCH-L1. Furthermore, GFAP (HR 5.66, 95% CI 2.91-11.00) and NfL (HR 2.72, 95% CI 1.57-4.71) were associated with dementia-specific mortality in fully adjusted models. GFAP (HR 2.06, 95% CI 1.22-3.49) and NfL (HR 2.16, 95% CI 1.66-2.81) were also associated with cardiovascular-specific mortality in fully adjusted models. Plasma biomarkers of neurodegeneration, particularly GFAP and NfL, were associated with increased risk of all-cause, dementia-specific, and cardiovascular-specific mortality in a biracial cohort. These associations should be considered when assessing links between these biomarkers and other outcomes, as well as when used in clinical practice.
items.summary_ja:
背景：血液中の神経変性バイオマーカーは非侵襲的かつ広く利用可能な指標であるが、人種多様な集団における長期の全死亡および認知症特異的死亡との関連は十分に検討されていない。  
方法：米国の黒人・白人混合コホート（REasons for Geographic and Racial Differences in Stroke）から無作為抽出した917名（平均年齢67.4歳、約半数が黒人）を対象に、血漿中の神経変性マーカー（NfL、総タウ、GFAP、UCH-L1）を測定し、平均11.1年の追跡期間中の死亡リスクとの関連を競合リスクを考慮したCox回帰モデルで解析した。  
結果：総タウは死亡リスクと関連しなかったが、GFAP、NfL、UCH-L1は全死亡リスクと有意に関連した。特にGFAP（HR 5.66）とNfL（HR 2.72）は認知症特異的死亡リスクとも強く関連し、さらに心血管特異的死亡リスクとも関連が認められた。  
結論：血漿中の神経変性バイオマーカー、特にGFAPとNfLは、全死亡および認知症・心血管疾患による死亡リスクの増加と関連しており、これらのバイオマーカーを臨床や研究で用いる際にはこれらの関連性を考慮すべきである。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、血中の神経変性バイオマーカー（GFAP、NfL、UCH-L1）が、二つの人種グループを含むコホートにおいて、全死亡リスクおよび認知症特異的死亡リスクと関連するかを検証した。約11年の追跡で、GFAPとNfLは全死亡、認知症特異的死亡、心血管死亡のリスク上昇と有意に関連し、総タウは関連しなかった。これらのバイオマーカーは臨床評価や研究において重要な指標となる。

items.title: Incidence of Childhood Stroke and Association With Recent Infection: A Population-Based Study Using Linked Data.
items.abstract: There are limited population-based data on the incidence and risk factors for childhood stroke, including associations with recent infection and vaccination. Therefore, we aimed to determine (1) the incidence of childhood ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke and (2) associations between a recent infection or vaccination and the risk of childhood stroke. A population-based case-control study was undertaken using linked administrative data from 2017 to 2023 in Victoria, Australia. All residents, aged 28 days to <18 years, were included. Infections in the 60 days immediately before admission were ascertained using state-wide notifiable infections and hospital admissions data sets. Vaccinations in the 42 days immediately before admission were ascertained using the Australian Immunisation Register. Strokes were identified in state-wide hospital admissions and death registry databases. Each case of childhood stroke was matched with up to 5 nonstroke controls on age (1-year bands), sex, socioeconomic position, comorbidities, and year. Conditional logistic regression was used to examine associations between infection and vaccination with childhood stroke. Over the 7 years, 571 childhood strokes (60% ischemic; median age 8.2 years; 44% female patients) occurred among 9,881,934 person-years (5.8 events [95% CI 5.3-6.3] per 100,000 person-years). Two in 5 patients had evidence of an infection in the preceding 60 days, with lower respiratory infections (n = 74), sepsis (n = 67), upper respiratory tract infections (n = 63), meningitis/encephalitis (n = 40), gastrointestinal tract infections (n = 28), and urinary tract infections (n = 22) being the most common. Children with stroke (vs matched controls) were more likely to have had a recent infection (cases 41.9% vs controls 18.6%; adjusted odds ratio [aOR] 2.54, 95% CI 1.97-3.27). The magnitude of this association was greater for ischemic stroke (aOR 3.39, 95% CI 2.45-4.69) than hemorrhagic stroke (aOR 1.90, 95% CI 1.24-2.90). No significant association was detected between recent vaccination and childhood stroke (cases 4.2% vs controls 2.5%; aOR 1.69, 95% CI 0.92-3.09). We provide contemporary data on new cases of childhood stroke in Australia, using population-wide linked data. Having a recent infection doubled the risk of childhood stroke. We found no significant evidence of an association between vaccination and childhood stroke.
items.summary_ja: 本研究は、オーストラリア・ビクトリア州の人口ベースの連結データを用いて、2017年から2023年までの小児脳卒中の発生率と、直近の感染症や予防接種との関連を調査した。対象は28日から18歳未満の全住民で、感染症は入院前60日間、予防接種は42日間の記録から抽出した。571例の小児脳卒中（60％が虚血性、中央値年齢8.2歳）が9,881,934人年中に発生し、発生率は10万人年あたり5.8件であった。脳卒中患者の約42％が直近に感染症を有し、特に下気道感染や敗血症が多かった。感染歴のある子どもは、感染歴のない対照群に比べ脳卒中リスクが2.54倍（虚血性は3.39倍、出血性は1.90倍）高かった。一方、予防接種と脳卒中の関連は統計的に有意ではなかった。結論として、小児脳卒中のリスクは直近の感染症で増加するが、予防接種とは関連しないことが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: オーストラリア・ビクトリア州の2017～2023年のデータを用いた人口ベースの研究で、28日～18歳未満の小児脳卒中571例を解析。小児脳卒中の発生率は年間5.8/10万人で、発症前60日以内の感染歴がある患者は非発症者より有意に多く（41.9%対18.6%、調整オッズ比2.54）、特に虚血性脳卒中で強い関連が認められた。一方、直近のワクチン接種と脳卒中の関連は認められなかった。感染が小児脳卒中のリスク因子であることを示す重要な知見である。

items.title: Relationship Between Hematoma Location and Underlying Small Vessel Disease in Cerebellar Intracerebral Hemorrhage.
items.abstract: In supratentorial intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH), hematoma location serves as a useful proxy for the underlying cerebral small vessel disease (cSVD) subtype, especially in the context of the Boston criteria. Whether this framework applies to spontaneous cerebellar ICH (cICH) remains unclear. We investigated whether hematoma location in cICH reflects distinct cerebral small vessel pathologies and explored an approach to support the diagnosis of underlying cerebral amyloid angiopathy (CAA) in this setting. We performed a retrospective multicenter study of consecutive patients with spontaneous cICH admitted to 3 tertiary hospitals in Berlin, Germany, between 2010 and 2024. Clinical, neuroimaging (CT/MRI), and neuropathologic data were collected. cICH location was categorized as superficial, deep, or mixed. Deep and mixed cICH locations were grouped together. MRI-based cSVD markers and neuropathology-confirmed diagnoses were analyzed. CAA was categorized as probable vs no CAA (i.e., nonprobable) using the Boston criteria v2.0. Univariate regression analyses were performed for associations with cICH location. Subsequently, we proposed pilot clinical-MRI criteria that might support the presence of CAA as the cause of cICH. Among 221 patients with cICH (median age 75 years, interquartile range 65.5-84.5, 57% female), 31 (14%) had superficial and 190 (86%) had deep/mixed cICH. MRI was available in 100 and neuropathology in 35 patients. Superficial cICH location was associated with probable CAA per Boston criteria v2.0 (odds ratio [OR] 8.14, 95% CI 1.25-53.25), whereas deep/mixed cICH was linked to higher systolic blood pressure (OR 1.03, 95% CI 1.01-1.05 per mm Hg) and more severe cSVD burden on MRI (OR 5.37, 95% CI 1.97-14.58). Among patients with available pathology (n = 35), 33.3% of patients with superficial cICH had evidence of CAA vs 3.1% in deep/mixed cICH. Our exploratory construct-"Boston criteria v2.0-cICH with supporting CAA features"-showed a specificity of 94.4% and sensitivity of 60.0% against a probable CAA diagnosis (based on supratentorial findings) in the total patient sample. Superficial and deep/mixed cICH exhibit distinct clinical, neuroimaging, and neuropathologic profiles, suggestive of divergent cSVD etiologies. Limitations include the sample size and the retrospective design. Our proposed criteria represent a proof-of-concept tool to support CAA diagnosis in cICH within the Boston criteria v2.0 framework but require further validation.
items.summary_ja:
背景：大脳半球内出血（ICH）では、血腫の位置が基礎となる脳小血管病変（cSVD）のサブタイプを示す指標となるが、小脳ICH（cICH）において同様の関連性があるかは不明である。  
方法：2010～2024年にベルリンの3次医療機関に入院した自発性cICH患者221例を対象に後ろ向き多施設研究を実施。血腫位置を表層、深部、混合に分類し、MRIのcSVDマーカーや病理診断と関連付けた。Boston基準v2.0を用いて脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）の診断を行い、血腫位置との関係を解析した。  
結果：患者の14％が表層cICH、86％が深部/混合cICHであった。表層cICHはCAAの存在と強く関連（オッズ比8.14）、深部/混合cICHは高血圧と重度のcSVDと関連した。病理検査例では、表層cICHの33.3％にCAAが認められたのに対し、深部/混合cICHは3.1％であった。提案した臨床・MRI基準はCAA診断の特異度94.4％、感度60.0％を示した。  
結論：表層と深部/混合cICHは異なるcSVD病態を反映しており、提案基準はcICHにおけるCAA診断支援の有用な概念的ツールとなるが、さらなる検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 小脳内出血（cICH）における血腫の位置は、基礎となる小血管病変（cSVD）の種類を反映すると考えられる。本研究は、221例のcICH患者を対象に血腫位置（表層型と深部/混合型）とcSVDマーカー、神経病理所見を解析した。表層型は脳アミロイド血管症（CAA）と強く関連し、深部/混合型は高血圧や重度のcSVDと関連した。提案した臨床MRI基準はCAA診断の補助となる可能性が示されたが、さらなる検証が必要である。

items.title: Safety of Physical Activity After Cervical Artery Dissection.
items.abstract: Cervical artery dissection (CeAD) is a major cause for stroke in young adults. A timely association with minor-to-moderate unimposing cervical trauma, which is often sports-related, is common in CeAD. Our goal was to assess whether physical activity puts patients at risk post-CeAD. Pooled data from two prospective observational CeAD cohorts with in-person follow-up of at least 1-year post-CeAD were assessed. Changes in physical activity were recorded using patient-reported assessment of change in activity compared to pre-CeAD. Baecke score-derived sports index was applied to address the association between physical activity intensity and our outcomes. Outcomes were (1) recurrent dissection and (2) cerebral ischemia upon follow-up. A total of 648 CeAD patients were recorded. Physical activity-specific follow-up data were available in 333 (59.7%). The median follow-up duration was 6.5 (IQR 3.1, 10.9) years with 17/333 (5.1%) suffering CeAD recurrence and 22/33#3 (6.6%) experiencing cerebral ischemia. A total of 197 of 333 (59.2%) patients reported a change in physical activity post-CeAD (127 [64.5%] decrease, 70 [35.5%] increase). Neither overall change, increase, or decrease of physical activity was associated with recurrent CeAD or cerebral ischemia (p > 0.2 throughout). However, regular performance of higher-intensity sports, assessed via Baecke score-derived sports index, associated in trend to dissection recurrence (OR 3.43 [0.86, 13.64]; p = 0.080). CeAD patients should be reassured that regaining physical activity after CeAD is safe. However, moderation on exertion should be discussed on an individual patient basis.
items.summary_ja:
背景：頸動脈解離（CeAD）は若年成人の脳卒中の主要原因であり、軽度から中程度のスポーツ関連外傷が契機となることが多い。CeAD後の身体活動が再発リスクに影響を与えるか評価する必要がある。  
方法：2つの前向き観察コホートから計648例のCeAD患者データを統合し、少なくとも1年以上の対面フォローアップを実施。患者報告によるCeAD前後の身体活動変化を記録し、Baeckeスコアを用いて運動強度と再発・脳虚血発症の関連を解析した。  
結果：333例（59.7%）に身体活動データがあり、中央値6.5年の追跡で再発5.1%、脳虚血6.6%を認めた。59.2%が身体活動に変化を報告（64.5%減少、35.5%増加）したが、活動の増減はいずれも再発や脳虚血と有意な関連を示さなかった（p>0.2）。ただし、高強度スポーツの定期的実施は再発傾向と関連した（OR 3.43、p=0.080）。  
結論：CeAD後の身体活動再開は安全であるが、過度な運動は個別に注意が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 頸動脈解離（CeAD）は若年層の脳卒中原因の一つで、スポーツなどの軽度外傷と関連することが多い。本研究はCeAD後の身体活動の安全性を検討し、648例中333例の追跡で、身体活動の増減は再発や脳虚血と関連しなかった。一方、高強度スポーツの継続は再発リスクの傾向を示した。CeAD患者は身体活動再開は基本的に安全だが、運動強度は個別に調整すべきである。

items.title: Glycoprotein IIb/IIIa Agents in Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Niche in the Making?
items.abstract: Variations in thrombus composition significantly influence the efficacy of conventional thrombolytic therapies in acute ischemic stroke. Emerging treatments, designed to target distinct components of the thrombus, are currently under evaluation and offer renewed hope for enhancing clot dissolution and improving clinical outcomes. This review will examine the current evidence surrounding glycoprotein IIb/IIIa inhibitors in the treatment of acute ischemic stroke, drawing on the latest randomised-controlled trials, identifying promising therapeutic candidates and evaluating the clinical contexts in which these agents are most likely to be beneficial.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性虚血性脳卒中における血栓の構成は多様であり、従来の血栓溶解療法の効果に大きく影響する。  
方法：本レビューでは、最新のランダム化比較試験を中心に、血栓の特定成分を標的とするグリコプロテインIIb/IIIa阻害剤の治療効果を検討した。  
結果：グリコプロテインIIb/IIIa阻害剤は、従来療法に比べて血栓溶解を促進し、臨床転帰の改善が期待される有望な治療候補として浮上している。特に、血栓の性状や患者の臨床状況に応じて効果が異なることが示唆された。  
結論：グリコプロテインIIb/IIIa阻害剤は急性虚血性脳卒中治療における新たなニッチとして位置づけられつつあり、今後の臨床応用に向けてさらなる検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本論文は、急性虚血性脳卒中における血栓成分の多様性が従来の血栓溶解療法の効果に影響を与える点に着目し、グリコプロテインIIb/IIIa阻害剤の有効性を最新のランダム化比較試験を基に検討する。これらの新規治療薬は特定の血栓成分を標的とし、血栓溶解促進と臨床成績の改善に期待が寄せられている。

items.title: Perinatal Arterial Ischemic Stroke Phase 3 Trial Protocol for Intensive Infant-Toddler Rehabilitation (I-ACQUIRE).
items.abstract: Infants and toddlers with perinatal arterial ischemic stroke face a high risk for lifelong neuromotor impairments and multiple disabilities. Phase 3 clinical trial evidence is urgently needed to identify efficacious treatment to improve outcomes. The I-ACQUIRE Phase 3 trial (Perinatal Arterial Stroke: A Multisite RCT of Intensive Infant Rehabilitation) is a 15-site randomized clinical trial of 2 dosages of I-ACQUIRE, a multicomponent, therapist-delivered intervention including key components of constraint-induced movement therapy compared with usual and customary treatment. The trial recruited children 8 to 36 months old with parent-reported perinatal arterial ischemic stroke, hemiparesis, good health, and no prior botulinum toxin or constraint-induced movement therapy. Central 1:1:1 randomization assigned children to High-dose I-ACQUIRE (6-hour sessions, 5 days/wk, 4 weeks), Moderate-dose I-ACQUIRE (3-hour sessions, 5 days/wk, 4 weeks), and Usual and Customary Treatment. Blinded assessments at baseline, end-of-treatment, and 6-months later include the Emerging Behaviors Scale (success defined as % with gains ≥7 points), the primary outcome for unilateral skills on the paretic arm-and-hand; and the Mini-Assisting Hand Assessment, the secondary outcome for bimanual activities. Parents also rate children's motor skills, treatment responses, and stress. Statistical analyses include 2-sample binomial tests for group differences and linear mixed regression models. The registered trial adheres to international trial reporting guidelines and has a parent council. This study protocol describes intervention components plus training and monitoring of treatment fidelity. The trial recruited N=216 children; 198 completed baseline assessments, and 168 (85 boys and 83 girls) qualified for the modified intent-to-treat sample. The mean age was 18.0 (SD=7.6) months. A majority had right-sided paresis (70%); 51% had seizures/epilepsy. Children varied widely in functional classification levels and parent ratings. The trial sets a unique high threshold for efficacy and proposes sensitivity and exploratory analyses to consider differential response patterns to treatment. If 1 or both I-ACQUIRE dosages lead to significant improvements, then Phase 3 evidence will assist in infant/toddler rehabilitation decision-making. URL: https://www.clinicaltrials.gov; Unique identifier: NCT03910075.
items.summary_ja:
背景：周産期動脈性虚血性脳卒中（PAIS）を持つ乳幼児は、生涯にわたる神経運動障害や多様な障害のリスクが高い。効果的な治療法を明らかにするため、フェーズ3の臨床試験が求められている。  
方法：I-ACQUIREフェーズ3試験は、多施設ランダム化比較試験で、8～36か月のPAIS患児216名を対象に、高用量（6時間/日、週5日、4週間）、中用量（3時間/日、週5日、4週間）のI-ACQUIRE介入と通常治療の3群に1:1:1で割り付けた。主要評価項目は片麻痺側の運動技能向上（Emerging Behaviors Scale）、副次評価は両手使用能力（Mini-Assisting Hand Assessment）で、治療前、終了時、6か月後に盲検評価を実施。  
結果：198名がベースライン評価を完了し、168名（平均18か月、70％が右片麻痺、51％にてんかん合併）が解析対象となった。機能レベルや親の評価には大きなばらつきがあった。  
結論：本試験は高い効果判定基準を設定し、感度分析や探索的解析も計画している。いずれかの用量のI-ACQUIREが有意な改善を示せば、乳幼児リハビリの意思決定に重要なフェーズ3エビデンスを提供する。
items.summary_short_ja: 周産期動脈性虚血性脳卒中の乳幼児を対象に、集中的リハビリテーション（I-ACQUIRE）の効果を検証する多施設ランダム化第3相試験を実施。216名中168名が解析対象で、高用量・中用量I-ACQUIREと通常治療を比較。主要評価は片麻痺腕の機能改善で、治療の有効性判定に高い基準を設定。結果は乳幼児リハビリの治療方針決定に貢献する見込み。

items.title: Low-Intensity Monitoring for Mild-to-Moderate Acute Ischemic Stroke Is Cost Saving: Economic Evaluation for OPTIMISTmain.
items.abstract: OPTIMISTmain (Main Optimal Post rtPA-IV Monitoring in Ischemic Stroke Trial) has shown that low-intensity monitoring is feasible and safe compared with standard monitoring in stable patients who receive thrombolysis treatment for acute ischemic stroke of mild-to-moderate neurological impairment. We aimed to estimate the economic benefits of low-intensity care compared with standard care.
